title: Dark Mist Dweller
description: Adds cloudy entity that hunts you when it's getting night
body:
Mod adds creature that SPOILER: waits till player comes close and then appears and starts hunting player. You cant kill this creature with any weapon, only diving into river can save you. Also you can try burn it. And village is safe from them since golems deal with them with ease.
Model is made by me, textures are also made by me, animations are warden's. I was inspired by land of pain game when creating monster.
